Independent studio theme

Shape a portfolio that feels deliberate from the first scroll.

Nolan Showcase Theme 06 gives architecture, interiors, and design studios a refined classic WordPress foundation with sharp hierarchy, responsive sections, and accessible interaction patterns.

Studio-ready sections

Present the work, the thinking, and the next step.

01

Editorial case studies

Balanced image placeholders, project metadata, and concise copy blocks make portfolio entries easy to scan.

02

Conversion rhythm

Clear calls to action are integrated without turning the homepage into a sales page.

03

Accessible navigation

The mobile menu uses semantic controls, aria state, keyboard support, and visible focus treatment.

Operating model

A measured structure for premium service brands.

Discover

Define the brief, audience, constraints, and presentation priorities.

Compose

Arrange case studies, proof points, and contact prompts into a confident homepage sequence.

Launch

Ship a self-contained classic theme with local assets and static preview parity.

Journal

Notes from the studio

Research

Making project evidence easier to trust

A compact approach to project pages that pairs outcomes with decisions.

Systems

Why rhythm matters in service websites

Spacing, contrast, and recurring calls to action help visitors move with less friction.

Launch

Static previews for WordPress themes

A GitHub Pages mirror keeps design review possible before WordPress is installed.
